title: Minimum Cost to Make All Characters Equal
titleCn: 使所有字符相等的最小成本

testcases.input: s = "0011" Output: 2 Explanation: Apply the second operation with i = 2 to obtain s = "0000" for a cost of 2. It can be shown that 2 is the minimum cost to make all characters equal.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Apply the second operation with i = 2 to obtain s = "0000" for a cost of 2. It can be shown that 2 is the minimum cost to make all characters equal.

testcases.input: s = "010101" Output: 9 Explanation: Apply the first operation with i = 2 to obtain s = "101101" for a cost of 3. Apply the first operation with i = 1 to obtain s = "011101" for a cost of 2. Apply the first operation with i = 0 to obtain s = "111101" for a cost of 1. Apply the second operation with i = 4 to obtain s = "111110" for a cost of 2. Apply the second operation with i = 5 to obtain s = "111111" for a cost of 1. The total cost to make all characters equal is 9. It can be shown that 9 is the minimum cost to make all characters equal.
testcases.expectedOutput: 9 Explanation: Apply the first operation with i = 2 to obtain s = "101101" for a cost of 3. Apply the first operation with i = 1 to obtain s = "011101" for a cost of 2. Apply the first operation with i = 0 to obtain s = "111101" for a cost of 1. Apply the second operation with i = 4 to obtain s = "111110" for a cost of 2. Apply the second operation with i = 5 to obtain s = "111111" for a cost of 1. The total cost to make all characters equal is 9. It can be shown that 9 is the minimum cost to make all characters equal.
